findings.evidence: Lines 112-116 document `relBoundary` as the home of `π_k(...)` while defining only `Subgroup (Diff I M n)`; lines 27-29 of the module doc say the C^∞ topology/closedness is deferred.
findings.fix: Restrict the docstring to the pointwise boundary-fixing subgroup, or explicitly say it is intended to underlie the later topologized relative diffeomorphism group.
findings.issue: `Diff.relBoundary` is documented as “the home of the relative homotopy classes `π_k(Diff(M, ∂M))`,” but the declaration is only `def relBoundary : Subgroup (Diff I M n)` and does not provide a topology or homotopy-group object.

summary: The added file has module and declaration docstrings, but `Diff.relBoundary` still overstates what the declaration provides by assigning homotopical meaning to a bare subgroup without the topology needed for homotopy groups.
